heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 16137 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Amendments2020—Subsec. (a). substituted “2024” for “2016”.Pub. L. 116–2602011— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this part $200,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2007 through 2011, to remain available until expended.”Pub. L. 111–364

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this part $100,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2012 through 2024, to remain available until expended.

children.heading: Management and oversight
children.label: b Management and oversight
children.text: The Administrator may use not more than 1 percent of the amounts made available under subsection (a) for each fiscal year for management and oversight purposes.
